nambootiri tells us about this, as a derivation that could be
drawn from the 'Horetyahoratra vikalpameke' sloka ofBrihat
Jataka. Could it be a meaning Mihira actually intended to
convey? Don't know. But still as a meaning supported by
even Saravali (which could be termed an elaboration of
concepts laid down by Mihira) we should accept that the
system is authentic. The Saravali quote is given below-

[The 972 Chooda pada (Sookshma Lagna) completes a
1800 minutes of the zodiac circle in one rotation] The words
Chooda pada, Sookshma Hora and Sookshma Lagna are
synonymous.
Some astrologers argue that the same is a method given
for BT rectification.
